reason: SSOT/RTL contract is not concrete enough for generic cocotb scoreboard generation.

questions.decision_needed: Map transaction field 'load' to a real input port.
questions.evidence: rtl_contract.input_map.load='instr_data', but 'instr_data' is not an input port.
questions.downstream_effect: The cocotb driver must know which DUT pin receives each FunctionalModel field.

questions.decision_needed: Map observable 'pc_next' to a real output port.
questions.evidence: rtl_contract output port 'pc' is not an SSOT output port.
questions.downstream_effect: The cocotb monitor must observe the same value that FunctionalModel predicts.

questions.decision_needed: Map observable 'busy_next' to a real output port.
questions.evidence: rtl_contract output port 'busy' is not an SSOT output port.
questions.downstream_effect: The cocotb monitor must observe the same value that FunctionalModel predicts.

next_action: Repair SSOT/RTL contract through ATLAS, rerun /ssot-rtl, then rerun /tb.
